mapper.sql:
select ui.college , sr.building_name , sr.user_info_user_info_id_1 , sr.room_number , ui.student_id , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , ui.password , ui.registration_date , ui.major , ui.name , ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 , ui.phone_number , sr.scan_id , sr.scan_time
FROM scan_record sr left join user_info ui on sr.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id
mapper.select:
select ui.college , sr.building_name , sr.user_info_user_info_id_1 , sr.room_number , ui.student_id , ui.role_enum_role_enum_id_1 , ui.password , ui.registration_date , ui.major , ui.name , ui.user_status_enum_user_status_enum_id_1 , ui.phone_number , sr.scan_id , sr.scan_time
FROM scan_record sr left join
user_info
ui on sr.user_info_user_info_id_1 = ui.user_info_id
${ew.customSqlSegment}
